Philosophy

Reading list

These are not book reports. They're where I think in public — tracking what ideas shifted my perception and what questions I'm still carrying.

Currently reading

Plato 375 BCE

The Republic

"The cave is not a metaphor for ignorance — it's a description of the default state."

in progress

Completed

Beyond Good and Evil

Friedrich Nietzsche · 1886

"The will to power is not aggression — it is the drive to become what you are."

Discipline and Punish

Michel Foucault · 1975

"Surveillance is not just a tool of control — it is the architecture of modern subjectivity itself."

Meditations

Marcus Aurelius · 170

"A private journal that became one of the most precise operating manuals for living under pressure."
Richard Cybersecurity · Philosophy · 2026
